Command.name: ask-os
Command.title: Ask OS
Command.Synopsis: ask-os question="What commands can render UI?"
Command.Description: Allows the AI to ask the live OS a question by using OSCall messages.

Parameter.name: question
Parameter.description: Question about commands, workflows, screen, state, or command manuals.

Command.Improve: Strengthen this command by adding more OSCall operations, not by giving the AI hidden authority.
